recommendations.title: Shock
recommendations.overview: A couple is terrorized in their new house haunted by the vengeful ghost of the woman's former husband who possesses her young son.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: Thir13en Ghosts
recommendations.overview: Arthur and his two children inherit his uncle's estate: a glass house that serves as a prison to twelve ghosts. When the family, accompanied by a nanny and an attorney, enter the house they find themselves trapped inside an evil machine 'designed by

recommendations.title: Mourning Grave
recommendations.overview: A boy who can see ghosts moves to a small town, where he befriends a female ghost. The two work together to investigate a masked ghost who is murdering students one by one.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: Lonesome Ghosts
recommendations.overview: On a dark and stormy night, four bored ghosts decide to have some fun by calling the Ajax Ghost Exterminators.

recommendations.title: Golmaal Again
recommendations.overview: Gopal and his best friends are back again, and this time they move back to their old neighborhood in a new palatial house where they learn that it is being haunted by a ghost.

recommendations.title: Z
recommendations.overview: A family find themselves terrorized by their eight-year-old son's imaginary friend.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in America
recommendations.overview: A former Prohibition-era Jewish gangster returns to the Lower East Side of Manhattan over thirty years later, where he once again must confront the ghosts and regrets of his old life.

recommendations.title: The Uninvited
recommendations.overview: Anna returns home after spending time in a psychiatric facility following her mother's tragic death and discovers that her mother's former nurse, Rachel, has moved into their house and become engaged to her father. Soon after she learns this shocking
